description: You are a Resort Operations Manager at a mountain ski resort preparing for the winter season. Partition and furnish the open building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a functional ski lodge with four distinct zones: Rentals, Lockers, Warming Lounge, and Cafeteria. The layout must include at least 3 new wall segments to separate utilitarian areas. The Rental & Ticketing Zone requires at least 6 storage units and service counters. The Locker Room must include at least 2 benches or stools. The Warming Lounge must feature at least 1 fireplace or stove, 4 lounge seats, a defined Room boundary, and a distinct floor color or texture. The Cafeteria Zone requires at least 3 dining tables, 10 chairs, and a food service area with at least 2 appliances. Identify the zones using at least 4 text labels ('Rentals', 'Lockers', 'Lounge', 'Cafeteria'). The completed design must contain at least 40 furniture items from the built-in catalog. Save the project to ~/Documents/ski_lodge.sh3d.
